title: Marmala waterfall
tagline: Marmala waterfall — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Marmala Waterfall is a waterfall which is located a few kilometres away from Erattupetta, in Kottayam district, Kerala, India, It is exactly 8 km from Teekoy.
overview.description: Marmala Waterfall is a waterfall which is located a few kilometres away from Erattupetta, in Kottayam district, Kerala, India, It is exactly 8 km from Teekoy. The road from Mangalagiri to Marmala Waterfall is currently under construction. One has to trek through the middle of an estate, over the slippery rocky path, in order to reach the waterfalls. Marmala waterfall is about 40 meter in height, plunging into a 12-meter deep pool and feeds the River Teekoy.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Illickal Kallu
topPlaces.description: Illikkal Kallu is a monolith located on top of the Illickal Malaa in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. The distance from kottayam railway station to illikal kallu is 57km.

topPlaces.name: Poonjar
topPlaces.description: Poonjar is a small Indian town located on the eastern side of Kottayam district in Kerala state, India. Before the independence of India, Poonjar had been the part of Travancore princely state.

topPlaces.name: Vagamon
topPlaces.description: Vagamon (Malayalam: [ʋaːɡɐmɐɳ]) is an Indian hill station and a revenue village located in Peerumedu Taluk of Idukki district, and also Meenachil taluk and Kanjirappally taluk of Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. Located in the Western Ghats 25 kilometres (16 mi) east of Erattupetta on the border of Kottayam-Idukki districts, Vagamon is known for its natural environment.

topPlaces.name: Kunnonny
topPlaces.description: Kunnonny is a village at the foothills of Western Ghats in the Kottayam district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Teekoy
topPlaces.description: Teekoy is a southern Indian village in the eastern part of Kottayam district in Kerala state. On 1 January 1962, it was established as a third grade gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Cholathadam
topPlaces.description: Cholathadam is a rural area in Kottayam district of the state of Kerala, India. It is part of the village of Poonjar Thekkekara, located 15 km (9.3 mi) from the town Erattupetta.

topPlaces.name: Erattupetta
topPlaces.description: Erattupetta (Malayalam pronunciation: [i:ra:tupe:ʈa]) is a municipality in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 40 km (24.9 mi) east of the district headquarters in Kottayam and about 157 km (97.6 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Elappunkal
topPlaces.description: Elappunkal is a village close to Erattupetta in the Kottayam district of Kerala state in India. It is situated on the Erattupetta–Thodupuzha state highway route.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Marmala waterfall?
faq.a: The best time to visit Marmala waterfall is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Marmala waterfall?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Marmala waterfall?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Marmala waterfall at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Marmala waterfall?
faq.a: Stays in Marmala waterfall start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Marmala waterfall?
faq.a: The top attractions are Illickal Kallu, Poonjar, Vagamon, Kunnonny, Teekoy.
